positive: A central, highly detailed illustration of a majestic celestial phoenix ascending from geometric forest roots. The style is neo-tribal tattoo art combined with art deco geometry. The phoenix should have powerful, flowing feathers rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and brilliant golds. Surrounding elements include stylized lunar phases, crescent moons, interwoven constellations (Ursa Major, Orion), and highly patterned biomechanical foliage. Focus on clean silhouettes, heavy linework, and strong contrast between the vibrant cosmic elements and the grounding forest roots. High level of detail, symmetrically composed, suitable for a central apparel print. Minimal shading, favoring solid, bold color blocks and linework.
negative: blurry, messy, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, signature, logos, low resolution, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, extra fingers, boring, plain, monochrome only
